title: Wooden Anti-Pilling Razor
features: Effective Pilling Removal: Effectively remove lint, pilling and unsightly threads from all your textiles, sweaters, coats, dresses, etc.
Environmentally friendly care: Made from natural materials (40% beech) and recyclable (aluminum), this anti-pilling razor is a sustainable alternative to electric shavers.
Comfortable grip: Its wooden handle provides a comfortable and ergonomic grip for easy use.
description: Easily maintain your clothes and make them look new with this eco-friendly beech wood anti-pilling razor.
